content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials look real (review_information/demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt) but notes.txt is a placeholder ("n/a") and does not explain how to reach the subscription-gated core features shown in App/PaywallView.swift:6-7.
Pierre: Apple's reviewers need actionable notes to reach paywalled functionality, and empty or "n/a" notes on a login-gated app are a common cause of 2.1 metadata rejections. The credentials themselves look fine, but nothing tells the reviewer how to test app blocking, schedules, and reports behind the subscription. Add notes explaining login steps and how to unlock or sandbox-test the premium features.
